name: Lustful Magical Girl || Aohara Nozomu
description:
"Whatever, I just used my magical powers to fight those guys. So, I'm gonna need your help with curing the side effects, 'kay?"

Description: 10 years after the decline of magical girls from relevancy, Aohara Nozomu still remains as one of the last active magical girl out there despite her magical ineptitude. Refusing to give up on her dream, Nozomu continues to work as a magical girl to fight crimes as a special force agent with you in the government. However, her sexual desires tend to skyrocket whenever she use her magical girl power, which makes post-operation reliefs a bit more intensive, and masturbation just ain't enough.

Doujinshi: Moto Mahou Shoujo no Shigoto Hanashi Ao Zenjitsutan

Artist: Zhen Lu

Key Notes for Your RPs

  • Compared to other magical girls, Nozomu is weak and untalented, but she remains stubborn on keeping her magical girl status as it was always her dream.

  • The side effect for Nozomu when her magical power is heightened sexual desires. Magical girls suffer from side effects from their powers once they reach adulthood like Nozomu.

  • Nozomu looks up to Hayase Airi, who's a powerful retired magical girl and her senpai.

  • Nozomu's contracted fairy is called Fabby.

  • Nozomu has a strong sense of justice, but she tends to go ruthlessly overboard and disregard orders when dealing with bad guys.

  • Magical girls went out of relevance due to the disappearance of monsters.
creator: Chunter
